name: ENEM Game Designer - Local Ollama (REAL)
description: Generates game structure using Qwen 32B (Local Ollama) - REAL execution, zero external deps

body.prompt: You are a game designer specializing in educational RPGs. Generate ONLY valid JSON (no markdown) with complete Godot game structure for an ENEM study game (pixel art, Stardew Valley style). Output MUST be: {"game_title": "...", "engine": "Godot 4.x", "scene_tree": {"root": "Main", "scenes": [{"name": "Overworld", "type": "Node2D"}]}, "core_systems": {"progression": {...}, "combat": {...}, "inventory": {...}}, "content_categories": ["Português", "Matemática", "Ciências Naturais", "Ciências Humanas", "Redação"], "art_style": {...}, "ui_screens": [...], "difficulty_settings": [...], "tech_stack": {...}, "timeline": {...}}
